steps.title: List the solutions
steps.content: The factored equation gives solutions $x=0$, $x=\frac{13}{4}$, and $x=\frac{u}{4}$.

steps.title: Use the given sum
steps.content:
The sum of the solutions is $9$, so add the three solution values.
$$0+\frac{13}{4}+\frac{u}{4}=9$$

steps.title: Solve for the constant
steps.content:
Combine the fractions and solve.
$$\frac{13+u}{4}=9$$
$$13+u=36$$
$$u=23$$
The answer is 23.
